step.title: Load Bundle
step.goal: Read the bundle. The Structure Outline (written by ticket-structure) is the primary input.

substep.title: Locate the Bundle
substep.ask:
Which ticket bundle should I plan the writing for?
The bundle should have Readiness Summary, Design Summary, AND Structure Outline sections in the ticket body. If any is missing, run the prior phase first.
substep.action: Validate paths (incl. {{worklog_path}}). Verify all three prior sections (Readiness, Design, Structure) are present in the worklog. Halt if any is missing.

substep.title: Read Bundle Files
substep.action:
Read the ticket, research, questions, and worklog files. Extract: - Primary tag, slug - Structure Outline (from worklog): section list with scope notes; Parts (if any) - Design Summary (from worklog): artifact chain, risk areas (some risks may need subagent dispatch to flesh out) - Research findings: prior subagent dispatches (a section that's already well-covered by prior research doesn't need new dispatch) - Linked DRs: the DR content (a section like "Decisions" references DRs and doesn't need new research)
Store in session: primary_tag, slug, structure_outline, design_summary, research_findings, linked_drs.

substep.title: Display Load Summary

section.title: Single-load discipline
section.description: Like other phase skills, this one reads the bundle once and works from session state. No re-reads in subsequent steps; the Edit operations in step 4 don't invalidate this load because they only touch the ticket body's new Plan section.
